[Service Reporting]
The following reports are provided via a dashboard in Dynatrace:

[Service Window]
The Service Window is the time frame during which the agreed support services from Cegeka are available. Service windows are defined in the related Service Level Management document to this contract.

SCOPE.sample_text:
Bronbundel voor Scope:

[Out of scope]
Everything that is not explicitly mentioned in this service description is by default out of scope of this Service. Specifically:

[Technical Application Management]
Application Performance Management (Observability) is a Service which foresees in the monitoring of the performance of specific business (critical) applications and its end2end flows. This service is based on the Dynatrace Software Intelligence Platform. The customer can choose out of a range of modular components within Dynatrace which can build up to a full scope APM service. The Service provides the tasks and activities needed to manage an Application Performance Management environment using Dynatrace (The Application) from a technical perspective. Together with the underlaying obligatory platform services, Cegeka unburdens the customer with all technical aspects from infrastructure up to the technical Application. The Standard Service features are focussed to keep the Service up-and-running, to keep it secure and to optimize its technical parameters.
